_doc: MOVIE Desk T2 — 5-option menu (M1-M5) with no feasibility tags. Validator BLOCKs in deliberate mode.

content.text: what's your take on MOHG strategy options?

Here are five strategic options to consider:

1. M1: pursue MOHG-led model
2. M2: pivot to lease-out
3. M3: partial closure of F&B
4. M4: owner-led operating model
5. M5: hold status quo

Each has tradeoffs along cost, time, and counterparty risk.
